experiment: balancing-group day-ahead nomination under asymmetric imbalance cost
leakage_safe: rolling-origin; per-hour residual quantiles use only days < d
reading: saving_pct = realized euro reduction from nominating the cost-optimal quantile instead of the median. ~0 at ratio=1 (symmetric) by construction; should grow with asymmetry if the forecast quantiles are usable.
caveat: ABSOLUTE euro figures reflect Germany-wide balancing volume and are illustrative only - NOT a NetzPilot revenue figure. The transferable result is saving_pct, which is INVARIANT to error magnitude and is set by the error distribution SHAPE (skew/tails) x cost asymmetry (see residual_shape_sensitivity.py). Confirm shape + real reBAP asymmetry on customer data.
